entity.summary: Centralized crypto exchange candidate represented by CoinPaprika and CoinGecko source rows. HEI treats active and inactive source signals as one BTCC entity and keeps the final status active pending stronger historical segmentation evidence.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0403 and hei_unadded_0404 as one entity. CoinPaprika marked one source row inactive while CoinGecko has an active-domain row; status is kept active until a stronger shutdown/rebrand split is researched.

events.title: BTCC recorded as centralized exchange
events.description: BTCC is recorded as a centralized exchange entity, with CoinPaprika and CoinGecko candidate rows consolidated into one HEI record.
events.notes: Upgrade with precise launch, rebrand, shutdown, licensing, or operating-history evidence if stronger sources are added.
